title: Positive flow: Selecting a course tile
preconditions: The app is open and the 'Similar Courses' screen is displayed.
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the 'Similar Courses' screen. | Tap on the 'C#' course tile. | Verify that the course details page is displayed.
expected_result: The course details page for 'C#' is displayed.

title: Negative flow: Attempting to select a non-existent course tile
preconditions: The app is open and the 'Similar Courses' screen is displayed.
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the 'Similar Courses' screen. | Attempt to tap on a non-existent course tile. | Verify that no course details page is displayed.
expected_result: No course details page is displayed.

title: Boundary validation: Empty course tile selection
preconditions: The app is open and the 'Similar Courses' screen is displayed.
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the 'Similar Courses' screen. | Do not select any course tile. | Verify that the screen remains on the 'Similar Courses' screen.
expected_result: The screen remains on the 'Similar Courses' screen.

title: Usability: Navigating back from course details
preconditions: The app is open and the 'Similar Courses' screen is displayed.
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the 'Similar Courses' screen. | Tap on the 'C#' course tile. | Navigate back to the 'Similar Courses' screen. | Verify that the 'C#' tile is still selected.
expected_result: The 'C#' tile is still selected in the 'Similar Courses' screen.

title: Accessibility: Screen reader interaction
preconditions: The app is open and the 'Similar Courses' screen is displayed.
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the 'Similar Courses' screen. | Use a screen reader to interact with the 'C#' course tile. | Verify that the screen reader provides the correct information about the 'C#' course tile.
expected_result: The screen reader provides the correct information about the 'C#' course tile.

title: Data persistence: Course tile selection after app restart
preconditions: The app is open and the 'Similar Courses' screen is displayed.
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the 'Similar Courses' screen. | Tap on the 'C#' course tile. | Restart the app. | Verify that the 'C#' tile is still selected in the 'Similar Courses' screen.
expected_result: The 'C#' tile is still selected in the 'Similar Courses' screen.
